---
name: obligatory_ai_generated_comment_guideline
description: Enforce mandatory AI provenance comments in every newly created file and directly above or in every newly created class. Use this whenever generating new files or classes in this repository.
---

generated by AI in Github cloud

# Obligatory AI Generation Comment Rule

## Rule
- For every newly created file, add this exact text near the top:
  - `generated by AI in Github cloud`
- For every newly created class, add this exact text in or directly above the class definition:
  - `generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Enforcement Checklist
1. Before finalizing changes, scan all newly added files.
2. Confirm the exact phrase appears near the top of each new file.
3. Confirm each new class has the exact phrase in or directly above the class.
4. Do not alter spelling, casing, or wording.

## Output Expectation
- If the comment is missing anywhere, add it before finishing.
- Report which files/classes were updated for compliance.
